description: You are a marketing analyst at Adventure Works Cycles planning a product bundling campaign. Implement a reusable affinity analysis system in the AdventureWorks2022 database using Azure Data Studio. Create a table named 'dbo.ProductAffinityResults' with columns for ProductA_ID, ProductA_Name, ProductB_ID, ProductB_Name, CoOccurrenceCount, ProductA_OrderCount, ProductB_OrderCount, TotalOrders, Support (decimal), Confidence_AtoB (decimal), Lift (decimal), and AnalysisDate. Develop a stored procedure 'dbo.usp_MarketBasketAnalysis' that accepts @StartDate and @EndDate to calculate these metrics from Sales.SalesOrderDetail, ensuring it clears previous results, avoids duplicate pairs (ProductA_ID < ProductB_ID), and only inserts pairs with CoOccurrenceCount >= 3. Execute the procedure for the period '2011-05-31' to '2014-06-30'. Create a view 'dbo.vw_TopProductBundles' containing all columns from the results where Lift > 1.0, ordered by Lift descending. Export the top 15 rows from this view with headers to /home/ga/Documents/exports/top_product_bundles.csv.

metadata.sql_hint: Use Self-Join on SalesOrderDetail.SalesOrderID. P(A) = Count(A)/Total, P(AB) = Count(AB)/Total, Lift = P(AB)/(P(A)*P(B))
